description:
Spam Free health insurance - https://ditto.sh/iuxakg

Best Health Insurance Plan for 2026 | HDFC Ergo Vs Niva Bupa | Sanjay Kathuria

Confused between HDFC ERGO Optima Secure and Niva Bupa ReAssure 2.0?
Most people buy health insurance based only on premium or brand. But actual differences appear only at claim time — room rent rules, non-payables, restoration, cashless support and bonus structure.

In this video, I break down both plans side-by-side so you understand:
• Which insurer is more reliable in real emergencies
• How bonuses actually grow your cover
• Unlimited restore vs yearly restore
• Which plan suits young couples, parents, and joint families
• Which one saves the most money at the time of hospital bill settlement

If you still feel confused, book a free consultation with Ditto’s experts. They help choose the right plan based on your life situation — not premiums or brand hype.

Comment which plan fits your family.

Subscribe for more smart financial breakdowns.

Keywords:
HDFC ERGO, Niva Bupa, Optima Secure, ReAssure 2.0, Health Insurance Comparison, Best Health Insurance India, Ditto Review, Medical Insurance Guide.

#partnership

comments.text:
This company is extremely disappointing, and this YouTuber’s promotion feels misleading. After watching her videos, I chose the Niva Bupa policy over others and paid a higher premium because everything looked trustworthy after my research.

I’ve been paying premiums for almost two years now. Recently, I tried to contact customer service for a basic annual health check-up. The app shows it as already booked — which is a glitch because I never booked it — yet I cannot reach anyone from their team. I’ve sent emails and called multiple numbers, but there has been no response at all. If this is the situation for a routine request, I can’t imagine what happens during a real emergency.

My recommendation: don’t hand over your hard-earned money expecting premium service during a medical crisis. In reality, you may struggle even to get support, let alone reimbursement equal to what you’ve paid.

It’s better to save your money yourself and use it wisely when needed.

comments.text:
Please BEWARE of NIVA BUPA, most Fraud company in Health Insurance
Dont ever go with Niva Bupa !!!!
***
They are the most FRAUDESTER company in Medicla insurance. They will never pay you if your claim amount is high. Recently my mother (68 years) got heart attack and treatment was taken in Fortis Hospital but they rejected my claim asking that once she had Arthritis 22 years ago and they need that Prescription of Doctor as hard copy. I explained that at time she had taken medication only for a month, she got relief and never has taken medication since then, also how can any one keep a Doctors prescription for 22 years, but they were adament on asking the 22 years ago prescription and they rejected my claim of 4.5 lacs on that ground. Infact with each day and my follow up they began to raise new request asking for Diabetes First prescription given by Dr. in 2015 (however diabetes was declared in policy), asking for Dengue prescription once she had in 2009.
I visited their office and found people that they settle big claims 1/100 otherwise they raise query in 99% cases of big amount. If you claim amount is equal or twice the premium amount you are paying then it is okay for them to settle the claim, but if your claim amount is higher or equal to policy limit then even GOD will not save you from NIVA BUPA.
They know that my mother is in elderly age and the claim of 4,50 lacs will be paid in 8 premium amount and every thing goes okay with my mother as such playing on a safer side NIVA BUPA choose the way to escape by raising unrealistic query to my claim.
After a long harrassment by them I asked them to cancel my policy and give my premium balance. ( I paid the premium thrice before for same policy of RS. 65000 every year), but they denied this refund also to me. If any one had any doubt I can present the proof to them. 
So, I decided to expose them on every social platform so that no other person shall get befooled by them.
I will recommend people that if your claim is twice the limit of your premium then it is okay for the company to pay you but if you think that your policy is of 10 lacs and you go to the Hospital thinking you have nothing to pay as your Insurance company will take care of you, then you are COMPLETELY WRONG. You have to pay from your pocket.
Please BEWARE of NIVA BUPA

comments.text:
Jab in sab private healthcare + insurance system ka claim aur bill jab dhoka dega tab logon ko universal healthcare aur Kejriwal ka Free healthcare yaad aa jayega. I've always said private players in healthcare is a disaster as it creates a conflict of interest for companies - they benefit from you being sick and denying your claims and we all know about the scams private hospitals pull of where the hospitals put excessive exaggerated tests and procedures, sometimes even milking money from a dead body by lying tot he families.

That's why socialist healthcare system which are public welfare oriented rather than for profit will always benefit the public - Kerala model, Kejriwal's Healthcare model fro delhi, Cuban healthcare, UK's NHS and European healthcare schemes are some of the examples which actually benefit the public.
